hero.title: Building tomorrow's
hero.description: FIAD is an African foundation committed to sustainable development, social innovation and economic inclusion. We act for a strong, just and prosperous continent.
hero.description2: Fondation Impact Afrique Durable acts to close that gap — transforming potential into concrete impact.

stats.title: Our 2030 ambition
stats.subtitle: Bold targets FIAD commits to achieving by 2030, driven by a deep conviction.

mission.title: A vision for Africa
mission.description: The Fondation Impact Afrique Durable works for a sovereign, inclusive and sustainable African development. We believe that African solutions, carried by Africans, can sustainably transform the continent.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Concrete initiatives deployed on the ground to transform communities

partners.title: Our strategic partners
partners.subtitle: International institutions, multilateral organizations and private partners supporting our mission

cta.title: Change is not built alone.
cta.description: Partners, donors, volunteers: your commitment makes the difference.

footer.description: The Fondation Impact Afrique Durable is a non-profit organization dedicated to sustainable development and social innovation in Africa.

foundation.title: The Foundation
foundation.subtitle: Our vision, our mission, our values

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: An African continent where every individual, regardless of origin, has the resources, opportunities and framework needed to fully contribute to sustainable and equitable development.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Design, finance and deploy high-impact programs in education, entrepreneurship, sustainable development and social innovation, in partnership with local communities, institutions and the private sector.

values.title: Our Values
values.integrityDesc: Transparency and honesty in all our actions

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question, a project, a partnership proposal? Our team will get back to you.
